description: 22 realistic Alberta small-business user prompts executed live against the deployed WorkspaceAlberta MCP server. Each trace = user prompt + ordered agent tool calls (with per-step thought, arguments, raw result, latency, error flag) + final synthesized user-facing output.

use_cases.persona: CWB-certified welding shop owner, Red Deer
use_cases.prompt: I run a small CWB welding shop in Red Deer with 8 guys. What government work is out there for a shop like mine right now?

steps.thought: Owner described his trade and town in one sentence — save it as his business profile so matching works.

arguments.description: CWB-certified welding shop: structural steel welding, pipe welding, mobile rig welding, repairs and custom fabrication. 8 employees.

steps.thought: Profile saved — rank live federal and Alberta opportunities against it.

use_cases.prompt: Any school or public building HVAC contracts out for tender in Alberta? We do commercial HVAC install and service.

steps.thought: Search the Alberta source for HVAC postings.
Open the most relevant result to check scope, closing date, and requirements.

use_cases.prompt: We do landscaping and grounds maintenance around Lethbridge and southern Alberta. Find me tenders we could bid on.

steps.thought: Unified search with a province filter keeps federal postings in play too, but scoped to Alberta delivery.
Pull details on the best-looking hit.

use_cases.prompt: We're a catering company in Fort Mac — camps, crew food, events. Any RFPs we should know about?

steps.thought: Search Alberta postings for catering and food service work.
Get details on the top result.

use_cases.prompt: I've got two gravel trucks out of Medicine Hat. Who's tendering gravel supply or hauling this summer?

steps.thought: Search Alberta for gravel supply and hauling tenders.
Also check what closes soonest so nothing is missed.

use_cases.prompt: Cleaning contracts for government buildings or schools in Edmonton — what's available?

steps.thought: Search both sources for janitorial and cleaning contracts.
Open details on the most relevant posting.

use_cases.persona: Small IT services firm, St. Albert
use_cases.prompt: We're a 5-person IT support shop in St. Albert. Any government RFPs for IT support or managed services we could actually win?

steps.thought: Search for IT support and managed services postings.
Summarize the Alberta landscape so the owner sees the shape of the market, not just one hit.

use_cases.prompt: Do municipalities tender printing work? We do signs, forms, and commercial printing in Airdrie.

steps.thought: Search for printing and sign work.
Give a quick summary of what's open in Alberta overall for context.

use_cases.prompt: Security services contracts — and tell me straight: is the best one worth bidding or not?

steps.thought: Find security service postings.
Run the bid/no-bid scorecard on the top match for a straight go/caution/no-go answer.

use_cases.prompt: Master electrician in GP. What electrical work is closing in the next two weeks? I can mobilize fast.

steps.thought: He needs the closing-soon list first, filtered tight to 14 days.
Then search specifically for electrical work to cross-check.

use_cases.persona: Fabrication shop owner, Edmonton — morning routine
use_cases.prompt: Give me my morning brief — what fits my shop and what's closing soon?

steps.thought: The brief needs his profile on file first — he told us last week what he does; re-save to be safe.

arguments.description: Custom metal fabrication shop: structural steel, stairs, railings, platforms, CWB-certified welding, steel supply and install for commercial and light industrial projects. 12 employees, serving central Alberta.

steps.thought: Generate the free daily bid brief.

use_cases.prompt: Winter's coming — any snow clearing contracts with towns or the province I should get in front of?

steps.thought: Search for snow removal and ice control tenders.
Open the top result.

use_cases.prompt: Sidewalks, curbs, flatwork — what concrete tenders are out there in central Alberta?

steps.thought: Search Alberta for concrete sidewalk and curb work.
Pull details on the best match.

use_cases.prompt: I heard the Rural Municipalities of Alberta has a fencing RFP out. What are the details — materials only or install too?

steps.thought: Confirm the RMA fencing posting by searching.
Open the RMA fencing RFP details (ref seen earlier: AB-2026-04199 — verify against search results).

use_cases.prompt: That Hwy 2 bridge tender near Morinville (AB-2026-04073) — pull the details and have the AI review it for risks and requirements.

steps.thought: Get the full tender details first.
Then run the Cohere AI review on the same reference.

use_cases.notes: Fresh-clone testing found analyze_contract_with_cohere dead-ends on Alberta references ('Contract not found'). Document actual behavior.

use_cases.persona: GC owner, Calgary — weighing federal vs provincial
use_cases.prompt: Is there more construction work on the federal side or the Alberta side right now? Where should I focus?

steps.thought: Same keywords, both sources, to compare volume and fit.
Now the Alberta side.

use_cases.prompt: Keep an eye on that bridge tender for me — I don't want to lose track of the closing date.

steps.thought: Add it to his persistent watchlist with a note.
Show the watchlist back to confirm it's tracked.

use_cases.prompt: The City of Calgary had an RFP for shop supplies (26-1524 I think). Is it still open and what are they buying?

steps.thought: Search to confirm the posting.
Open the specific reference.

use_cases.prompt: What's Alberta Transportation tendering right now? Give me the lay of the land.

steps.thought: Search Alberta for grading and highway work, which is how Transportation tenders read.
Summarize the Alberta market overall for the lay of the land.

use_cases.prompt: Any plumbing work in schools or hospitals out for tender? Journeyman plumber, small crew, Lethbridge.

steps.thought: Search for plumbing tenders.
Details on the top hit.

use_cases.persona: Any busy owner — deadline panic check
use_cases.prompt: What closes this week? I feel like I'm missing stuff.

steps.thought: Pure deadline triage across both governments, 7-day window.

use_cases.prompt: Asphalt paving contracts — parking lots, roads, anything. What's out there and is it worth our time?

steps.thought: Search for asphalt and paving work.
Summarize to judge whether the paving market is worth his estimating time.
